bullet.purpose.title: what does remux do? :3
bullet.purpose.description: remux fixes any issues with the file container, such as missing time info. it helps increase compatibility with old software, such as vegas pro and windows media player ^_^
bullet.explainer.title: how does it work? >_<
bullet.explainer.description: remuxing takes existing codec data and copies it over to a new media container. it's lossless; media data doesn't get re-encoded :3
bullet.privacy.title: on-device processing ^_^
bullet.privacy.description: cobalt remuxes files locally. files never leave your device, so processing is nearly instant >_< ^_^
